  1. recoder.java

Uses of Class
recoder.java.Import

Packages that use Import
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.schemajava
 
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.java.reference
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing implicit or explicit (named) references to other program elements.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.kit.transformation
This package contains transformation command objects and associated problem reports.
recoder.parser
This package contains the JavaCC generated parser.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.

    needs further testing - use at your own risks

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    UnitKit.getUnnecessaryImports(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, CompilationUnit cu)
    Query that finds all unnecessary import specifications in a compilation unit.
    Methods in recoder.kit with parameters of type Import
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    MiscKit.append(ChangeHistory ch, CompilationUnit parent, Import child)
    Transformation that appends the given Import to the list in the given Compilation Unit.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(Import child, CompilationUnit parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index and reports this if necessary.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(Import child, CompilationUnit parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index but does not report this.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(PackageReference child, Import parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(TypeReference child, Import parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
    static void
    MiscKit.prepend(ChangeHistory ch, CompilationUnit parent, Import child)
    Transformation that prepends the given Import to the list in the given Compilation Unit.
